response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience with some exposure to AI, but lacks the depth of AI-specific expertise, recognized products, or advanced academic credentials in AI required for a Principal Engineer role in AI strategy.
strengths: Extensive (20+ years) full-stack and infrastructure engineering experience across diverse domains.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial mindset through open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and leadership in technical innovation.
Strong technical breadth with contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators).
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, limiting depth in AI strategy.
AI experience appears secondary to broader engineering work, lacking demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms.
Director-level IC experience is unclear; current roles emphasize hands-on engineering over strategic leadership.
